name: Brain Free
recipeIngredient: 1 bag frozen bell pepper strips (or chunkies)
1/4 teaspoon cayenne (less if you're not into fire...)
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the bag of onion and add it to a non-stick pot. Heat until translucent.
2. Add the pepper strips and heat until thawed. Drain and rinse all the beans, then add them in.
3. Add about a cup of water, just so there are some juices. Heat until hot.
4. Once heated through, add the cumin, chipotle peppers (if using), and cayenne. Adjust seasonings to taste.
5. Serve over brown rice.
Voila! No chopping required - only one pot to wash (unless you count the rice pot). This serves three people and makes three leftover containers for future lunches.
